changes.heading: General

Garchomp.title: 1.21.1.2 The Roar of Sea and Sky

changes.heading: Attack \[BUGFIX\]
lines: Fixed a bug where, when dealing damage with Garchomp's boosted attack, additional damage or held item damage would occur before the boosted attack damage.

changes.heading: Natural Stats \[BUFFED\]
lines: Reduction rate of effects received from opponents: 20% → 25% (Level 1 to 15)

Tenacity (according to official patch notes): Tenacity is still a big issue that has yet to be fully understood. There has been some progress made, but as a community we have not fully understood what the full picture of tenacity looks like. If you are a math-inclined person and would like to help the community solve the last big piece of Unite, please join the [Unite Mathcord Discord server](https://discord.gg/4BssTu4g7p "Unite Mathcord Discord server").

changes.heading: Critical-Hit Rate Changes:
lines: General: Garchomp can no longer crit with Dragon Claw or Dragon Rush.

changes.heading: Rough Skin

Mega Gyarados.title: 1.21.1.2 The Roar of Sea and Sky

changes.heading: Attack
lines: General: Mr. Mime's left handed attacks were a shorter distance than right handed attacks. This change solidified all attacks to be the same range (the right handed attack).

changes.heading: Boosted Attack
lines: General: REWORK: Gains a Boosted Attack at set interval (5s) dealing increased damage and throwing enemies in the air for .5s.

changes.heading: Guard Swap -> replaced by Power Swap
lines: General: Creates a link between the user and the Pokémon this move hits. While the link holds, the user's movement speed increases and its hp is continually restored. The link will continue to hold for as long as the linked Pokémon stay in range or until another target is Power Swapped. If the linked Pokémon is an ally Pokémon, this move increases the movement speed of that Pokémon, increases the amount of damage it deals, and continually restores that Pokémon's HP. If the linked Pokémon is an enemy Pokémon, this move decreases the movement speed of that Pokémon, decreases the amount of damage it deals and deals damage over time to that Pokémon. Damage and healing ticks at a rate of 0.5s.
General: + Upgrade: Further increases the amount of damage dealt by ally Pokémon and further decreases the amount of damage dealt by opposing Pokémon.

changes.heading: Guard Swap+
lines: General: Fixed a bug which caused the healing to last indefinitely under certain circumstances.

changes.heading: Guard Swap:
lines: General: Now lasts as long as your target is in range, breaks after target moves too far away or the move is used again on another target.
General: Damage and healing triggers every half second instead of every second.
General: There was no formula change here, just the tick rates :).

changes.heading: Guard Swap:
lines: General: Bug fix. Guard Swap was not swapping Sp.Def, it only swapped Def. It now swaps both Sp.Def and Def.

changes.heading: Unite Move: Ebon Fist \[BUGFIX\]
lines: General: Fixed an issue where Ebon Fist would interrupt unite moves of some Pokémon.

changes.heading: General
lines: Fixed a bug where Unite Move: Flowing Fists could be used on Unstoppable targets.

changes.heading: Natural Stats \[BUGFIX\]
lines: General: Fixed an issue where Blastoise’s Defense and Special Defense at Lv.7-8 were lower than intended following the balance adjustment on October 17.

changes.heading: Natural Stats \[BUFFED\]
lines: Special Defense: 81 → 82 at Level 3; 420 → 455 at Level 15.

changes.heading: Evolution Level \[BUFFED\]
lines: General: Blastoise now evolves from Wartortle at level 7.

changes.heading: General
lines: General: Fixed a bug in which the attacked Pokémon's movement speed would decrease during Rapid Spin.
General: Fixed an issue in which you could use a Basic Attack and a move at the same time during Rapid Spin.

lines: Fixed a bug where the Arrokuda would sometimes bounce infinitely between two Pokémon, dealing infinite damage or until out of bounce range.

changes.heading: Gulp Missile:
lines: General: Bug fix: Activation time fixed.

changes.heading: Auto Attack:
lines: General: Attack speed seems to have changed. Cramorant now benefits from attack speed bonuses and scales with level.

changes.heading: Gatling Gulp Missile:

changes.heading: Basic Attack \[BUFFED\]

changes.heading: Stats

changes.heading: General

lines: Fixed a bug where movement speed was increased when holding an empowered attack.

changes.heading: Intrepid Sword \[BUG FIXED\]

changes.heading: General
lines: General: Hello full patch note reader or control + f enjoyer, I regret to inform you that Zacian's only "nerf" this patch was at the top of the notes, in the form of Comfey nerfs. Zacian is still fully capable of one shotting on level tanks with properly played combos, or just one shotting anything by facerolling. Have fun.

lines: Fixed a bug where Buddy Barrier and Energy Amplifier effects activated even when the move was not activated.

changes.heading: Soft Boiled and Egg Bomb

General: *(NEW)* Both moves now grant two egg charges each upon learning them. These moves now share a charge reserve.

changes.heading: Unite Move:

General: Cooldown: Unite Gauge is now harder to accumulate (about 15% longer).

changes.heading: General
lines: General: Inteleon releases this patch +1 day. Due to the date of Inteleon's release, we will note 2 things. With two core advisors and web dev attending NAIC, Inteleon's page will be delayed.
General: Also, please join the rest of us in wishing our web dev a very HAPPY BIRTHDAY!!! \(Let our dev have his birthday hangover.\).

changes.heading: Oblivious
lines: General: New: Has the Pokémon store up lost HP for a short time. When hitting an enemy with a move, the Pokémon restores some of its HP using the stored-up HP, and it also decreases the enemy's SpDef for a short time.

Damage (Second Leap (Furthest range)): 136% Attack replaced with 126%.

changes.heading: Magic Guard \[BUFFED\]
lines: General: Shield gained by healing allies scaling increased.

changes.heading: Unite Move: Wonder Wish \[BUFFED\]
lines: Hydro Pump (Damage per Hit (3 Hits):): 25% Increase
Block: 25% Damage Reduction added for 4s upon activating Block.
Hyper Beam: Damage limit to wild Pokemon previously was 2400 for both RSB and Execute damage combined. Now its separated: no limit for RSB, same limit for execute.

changes.heading: Unite Move: Wonder Wish
lines: Fixed a bug where Hyper Beam was doing more damage to wild Pokémon.

changes.heading: Thunderstorm Aerial \[BUGFIX\]
lines: Fixed a bug where the activation range of Alolan Raichu's Unite Move did not match the pre-activation indicator.

changes.heading: Ability: Surge Surfer \[BUGFIX\]
lines: Fixed a bug where the thrown duration from Buzzwole's Smack Down could be shortened if it hit Alolan Raichu right before its Surge Surfer ability dash was activated.

changes.heading: Surge Surfer \[BUGFIXED\]
lines: General: Fixed an issue where Alolan Raichu would be able to move using Surge Surfer while it was unable to act.

changes.heading: Muscle Band \[BUGFIX\]
lines: General: Fixed an issue where Alolan Raichu's Stored Power and Psychic triggered Muscle Band's effect.

changes.heading: General
lines: Fixed a bug where Mewtwo Y would become unable to Mega Evolve for the remainder of the match if they were knocked out immediately before Mega Evolving.

Mewtwo Y.title: 1.21.1.2 The Roar of Sea and Sky

changes.heading: Pressure \[BUFFED\]
lines: Mega Gauge behaviour: Changed: Mega Gauge is not lost when knocked out.

changes.heading: Held Item Adjustment \[NERFED\]
lines: General: Now holds Mewtwonite Y as a fixed held item.

changes.heading: Pressure \[BUFFED/NERFED\]
lines: General: Mewtwo's attack speed buff from Pressure gauge has been changed from a multiplicative 6% per stack and 40% for mega evolving to a flat 3% per stack and 35% upon mega evolving.

changes.heading: Basic Attack \[NERFED\]
lines: Range: Reduced by 0.5m in both regular and mega evolved forms.

changes.heading: Pressure \[NERFED\]
lines: General: Requires approximately 5 energy per additional second. Even if you don't have enough Aeos Energy (including 0), all the energy you have will be consumed.

changes.heading: Unite Move: Infinite Psyburn \[NERFED\]
lines: AKA: 212% Sp. Attack + 14 x (Level - 1) + 680 → 180% Sp. Attack + 12 x (Level - 1) + 580

changes.heading: Unite Move: Psykaboom \[CONTROL\]
lines: General: Method to re-aim the move changed. Control is now using the left stick/directional panel.

changes.heading: Infiltrator \[BUFFED\]
lines: Sp. Defense Pen: 2.5% per stack, 8 stacks (20%) → 5% per stack, 6 stacks (30%)

changes.heading: Unite Move: Ignite Midnight \[BUGFIXED\]
lines: Fixed a bug where Chandelure could be seen by burned opponents.

changes.heading: General
lines: Fixed a bug where the Burn applied by Moves would proc Shell Bell and Choice Specs. Fixed a bug where the Burn applied by the Boosted Attack would proc Muscle Band's passive effect.

changes.heading: Prankster \[BUGFIXED\]
lines: General: Fixed an issue where the time for Sableye to re-enter stealth after attacking was longer than intended.

changes.heading: General
lines: Fixed a bug where Mewtwo X would become unable to Mega Evolve for the remainder of the match if they were knocked out immediately before Mega Evolving.

Mewtwo X.title: 1.21.1.2 The Roar of Sea and Sky

changes.heading: Pressure \[BUFFED\]
lines: Mega Gauge behaviour: Changed: Mega Gauge is not lost when knocked out.

changes.heading: Held Item Adjustment \[NERFED\]
lines: General: Now holds Mewtwonite X as a fixed held item.

changes.heading: Pressure \[NERFED\]
lines: General: Requires approximately 5 energy per additional second. Even if you don't have enough Aeos Energy (including 0), all the energy you have will be consumed.

changes.heading: Unite Move: Infinite Psyburn
lines: Bugfix: Damage overlap bug has been fixed.

changes.heading: Boosted Attack \[BUFFED\]
lines: **Additional damage** increased: 7% Max HP → 8.5% Max HP

changes.heading: Attack  \[NERFED\]
lines: **Cap for additonal damage from Maximum HP** reduced: 1200 → 1000

changes.heading: General
lines: General: Sacred Sword - Adjusted the visual to match the hitbox.

Suicune.title: Patch 1.21.1.7 The Roar of Sea and Sky Part 2
1.21.1.2 The Roar of Sea and Sky

changes.heading: Pressure \[NERFED\]
lines: Shield amount: 50% Sp. Attack replaced with 45%.

changes.heading: Rattled: Effort Gauge \[NERFED\]
lines: Auto: 30 on use → 27 on use; 150 on hit
Flail: 75 on use → 68 on use; 225 on hit
Scoring a goal less than 10 points: 400 → 360
Scoring a goal with 10 points or more: 1500 → 1350

changes.heading: Unite Move: Compute and Crash \[BUGFIX\]
lines: Fixed a bug where an obstacle collision box would remain after the wall created by a three-enemy scan had disappeared.

changes.heading: Compute & Crush \[BUFFED\] & \[BUGFIX\]
lines: Fixed a bug involving unite cooldown.

changes.heading: Unite Move: Compute and Crush
lines: Unstoppable: Fixed an bug where the Unite move gauge would recover to 90% even though the move was activated.
Unstoppable: Fixed an issue where an invisible wall would remain even after the wall that had been generated had timed out automatically.

changes.heading: Basic Attack \[BUFFED\]
lines: General: Muscle Gauge is built on Wild Pokémon with a limit of one gauge built per hit.

changes.heading: General
lines: General: Swoleness increased. Honestly, the original nerf was ridiciulous.
General: May now be casted on Hinderance Resistant targets again.

changes.heading: Unite Move: Right as Rain \[BUFFED\]
lines: Movement speed increase: Increased from 30% to 50%.

changes.heading: Belly Bash \[BUFFED\]
lines: Shield amount: 5% max HP → 6.5% max HP

changes.heading: Unite Move: Belly Bash
lines: General: May not target Wild Pokémon now.

changes.heading: Basic & Boosted Attack \[BUGFIX\]
lines: Fixed a bug where attacks after using Unite Move: Plasma Gale could deal damage to Ho-Oh while Ho-Oh was invulnerable during its Unite Move: Rekindling Flame.

changes.heading: Volt Absorb
lines: General: Fixed an issue where after Zeraora was knocked out and respawned, Volt Absorb’s effect was still active.

changes.heading: General
lines: Fixed a bug that caused Eevee to deal special damage with its basic attacks.

changes.heading: Unite Move:
lines: General: Fixed a bug where using their Unite move would cause their lifesteal from damage to reset to 0.

changes.heading: Evolution Level \[BUFFED\]
lines: General: Venusaur now evolves from Ivysaur at level 7.

changes.heading: Boosted Attack:
lines: General: Laz note: There's either a temporary attack speed buff given while you have a boosted auto active or Ninetales' base attack speed was increased - it's likely the former. Either way this leads to an increase in the amount of attacks you get within Aurora Veil.

changes.heading: Stats:
lines: General: SIDEBAR: Okay, the JP patch notes called this a buff. I'd like to spend a brief section discussing these numbers. These Special numbers... are nigh *exactly* the same as Gardevoir's. They are literally identical except A9 has one more SpA at all times. It seems like this might have been a mistake, or perhaps it was intentional to line their stats. This does mean A9 will do less damage until Level 10. Very odd "buff" overall.

changes.heading: Unite Move:
lines: General: Fixed a bug in which damage did not increase when an opponent's Pokémon was frozen by the effect of a friendly Pokémon's move.

changes.heading: Snow Warning:
lines: Fixed a bug where Snow Warning could target enemies Ninetales couldn't see (like in bushes).
General: Also fixed a bug where Snow Warning would trigger more often when Ninetales was in Aurora Veil.

changes.heading: Illusion
lines: General: Illusion no longer grants Invincible and grants Unstoppable instead.

changes.heading: Natural Stats \[BUFFED\]
lines: Attack stat: 160 → 150 at Level 1; 670 → 700 at Level 15.

Scyther.title: 1.21.1.2 The Roar of Sea and Sky

changes.heading: Boosted Attack \[NERFED/BUGFIX\]
lines: General: Muscle Band no longer applies twice due to Scyther's Boosted Attack.

changes.heading: Cooldown Bug \[BUGFIX\]
lines: General: Fixed. No details on purpose!

changes.heading: Base Stats (Scizor)
lines: General: Ven note: Trying something different with the formatting because they changed so many stats at once. The effective health increase is approximately 1% per level, so 5% at level 5 6% at 6 etc.

changes.heading: Red Illusion Dive (Scizor)
lines: Damage (Initial Punch, Ground Punch, & Copy Contact): 41% Increase
